articles.title: Is ADA in trouble given the Cardano co-founder’s itch for a DOGE alliance
articles.description: ADA co-founder Charles Hoskinson made requests for an ADA-DOGE alliance as Elon Musk sealed the Twitter purchase. Musk has never hidden his support for Dogecoin. Hence, it could be the reason the ADA founder included a “Twitter clause” in his offer. With positives emerging from both camps, it was not out of the question if Hoskinson was desperate for a Twitter and DOGE alliance.
